personal_info.name: Dina Maher
personal_info.title: Flutter Developer | Cross-Platform Mobile Applications
personal_info.about_me: A Flutter Developer with +1 years of experience building high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. Proficient in state management, Firebase integration, and applying clean architecture principles. Committed to delivering intuitive user experiences and collaborating effectively to achieve project goals.

technical_skills: RESTful APIs, Firebase, Supabase, Hive, SQLite and Local Storage
OOP, SOLID Principles and Design Patterns

experience.title: Flutter Developer
description_points: Developed and maintained Flutter mobile applications for client projects.
Implemented REST API integration, state management, and responsive UI designs.
Collaborated with backend developers and designers to deliver scalable solutions.
Worked on the Tayser mobile application and contributed to feature development and maintenance.

experience.title: Flutter Developer
description_points: Developed student and parent mobile applications for a university management platform.
Implemented authentication, attendance tracking, course management, quizzes, grades, and notifications.
Integrated REST APIs using Dio and secure JWT authentication.
Built reusable components following Clean Architecture and feature-based project structure.

experience.title: Freelance Flutter Developer
description_points: Designed and developed a business management system for inventory, customers, expenses, and reporting.
Implemented analytics dashboards, PDF reporting, backup & restore, and multilingual support.
Built desktop and mobile versions using Flutter and Clean Architecture.
Integrated local databases and state management solutions for scalable performance.

experience.title: Freelance Flutter Developer
description_points: Delivered Flutter applications for freelance clients through the Nafezly platform.
Developed a Restaurant App with menu browsing and responsive user interfaces.
Built a Weather App integrating external APIs for real-time weather data.
Maintained clean, reusable code and ensured smooth user experience across devices.

experience.title: Freelance Flutter Developer
description_points: Worked on a ride-hailing application similar to inDriver.
Implemented Google Maps integration, real-time location tracking, and payment workflows.
Developed scalable UI components following Clean Architecture principles.
Collaborated remotely with the development team to improve app performance and user experience.

projects.name: InDriver
projects.short_description: Driver-side mobile application for accepting and managing freelance delivery tasks.
projects.description: A Flutter-based driver application designed for freelancers to receive, accept, and manage delivery or service requests in real time. The app includes live order tracking, earnings overview, and status management with a clean and responsive UI.

projects.name: Learnify University
projects.short_description: University management system for students and parents.
projects.description: A comprehensive Flutter mobile application developed for a university management platform. The system enables students and parents to access courses, lectures, attendance, grades, assignments, notifications, messaging, and AI-powered educational assistance through a secure and scalable architecture.

projects.name: Tayser App
projects.description: A Flutter mobile application developed as part of OnClick Company projects. Contributed to feature implementation, API integration, state management, and responsive user interface development.

projects.name: Skin Scan
projects.short_description: AI-powered wound and skin disease detection app.
projects.description: An AI-powered Flutter application for wound and skin disease detection using camera input and external AI models. The app provides instant diagnosis and guidance through REST API integration.

projects.name: Market E-commerce
projects.short_description: Flutter e-commerce app with authentication, cart, and REST APIs.
projects.description: A Flutter-based e-commerce application featuring authentication, product listing, cart management, and real-time REST API integration following clean architecture principles.

projects.name: Crates Management System
projects.short_description: Business management system for inventory, customers, expenses, reports, and analytics.
projects.description: A comprehensive Flutter desktop and mobile application designed to manage crate inventory, customer operations, expenses, reporting, and business analytics. The system provides real-time inventory tracking, PDF reporting, audit logging, backup & restore functionality, and multilingual support using a scalable feature-based clean architecture.

projects.name: Bookly
projects.short_description: Book browsing app using Google Books API.
projects.description: A Flutter book browsing application built with MVVM architecture and Cubit state management. Integrated Google Books API using Dio with robust error handling.

projects.name: Upper-UI
projects.short_description: Modern financial dashboard UI built with Flutter.
projects.description: A modern Flutter UI project for financial market tracking, featuring dashboards, charts, watchlists, authentication screens, and Light/Dark mode support.

projects.name: Delivery App
projects.short_description: Delivery app with real-time tracking and online payments.
projects.description: A Flutter delivery application with real-time location tracking, distance-based pricing, and Stripe/PayPal payment integration.

projects.name: Weather App
projects.short_description: Flutter weather forecasting application with dynamic UI and air quality monitoring.
projects.description: A modern Flutter weather application that allows users to search for any city and view detailed weather forecasts. The app provides a 14-day forecast, air quality information, dynamic weather-based themes, and responsive UI with smooth animations.
